guilds.name: Fighter's Guild
guilds.description: The Fighter's Guild trains warriors in combat, smithing, and battlefield mastery. Guild skills remain with the player even if they change guilds.

guildmaster.name: Guildmaster Brogan
guildmaster.greeting: Welcome, warrior. The Fighter's Guild demands strength, discipline, and steel. Prove yourself and rise through our ranks.

guilds.name: Thief's Guild
guilds.description: The Thieves' Guild operates in the shadows, teaching subtlety, deception, and the art of taking what isn't yours. Guild skills remain with the player even if they change guilds.

guildmaster.name: Shadowmaster Vex
guildmaster.greeting: So you found us. Good. That means you already have one of the skills we value. The Thief's Guild can make you... considerably wealthier.

guilds.name: Mage's Guild
guilds.description: The Mage's Guild teaches arcane arts, spell scribing, potion brewing, and wand and staff crafting.

guildmaster.name: Archmage Seraphel
guildmaster.greeting: The arcane arts demand precision and patience. Prove both, and the Guild will teach you to scribe, brew, and craft magic beyond your current imagining.

guilds.name: Cleric's Guild
guilds.description: The Cleric's Guild channels divine power into healing, protection, and holy crafting.

guildmaster.name: High Priest Aldric
guildmaster.greeting: The divine light guides those who serve faithfully. Serve this Guild with devotion, and you will learn to channel that light into scrolls, potions, and holy instruments.

guilds.name: Druid's Circle
guilds.description: The Druid's Circle communes with nature to brew wild remedies, scribe nature scrolls, and craft nature-imbued wands and staffs.

guildmaster.name: Elder Sylvara
guildmaster.greeting: The grove speaks to those who listen. Join our Circle, prove your attunement to nature, and you will learn to write her secrets, brew her gifts, and craft her power into wood and root.
